---
title: "Social Economy Data"
format: html
---

```{html}
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/d3@7"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js"></script>

<style>
.data-lab-wrap{max-width:860px;margin:auto;}
.source-box,.note-box{border:1px solid #d8dee9;border-radius:10px;padding:16px;margin:18px 0;background:white;}
.note-box{background:#eef4ff;border-color:#c8d9ff;}
.btn-group{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:18px 0;}
.dl-btn{border:1px solid #d8dee9;background:white;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;}
.dl-btn.active{background:#3156b3;color:white;}
.controls{display:flex;gap:18px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:12px 0 28px;}
.controls select{padding:9px 12px;border:1px solid #d8dee9;border-radius:8px;background:white;}
.kpi-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:12px;margin:22px 0;}
.kpi-card{background:white;border:1px solid #d8dee9;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;min-height:95px;}
.kpi-label{font-size:.78rem;color:#6b7280;margin-bottom:8px;}
.kpi-value{font-weight:800;color:#111827;}
.chart-box{background:white;padding:18px;margin-top:18px;}
.download-btn{display:inline-block;margin-top:22px;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;background:#eef4ff;color:#3156b3;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;}
@media(max-width:800px){.kpi-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}}
</style>

<div class="data-lab-wrap">

## Social Economy Trends Explorer

Interactive visualisation of cooperatives, associations, foundations, income indicators and selected macroeconomic context variables.

<div class="source-box">
<strong>Source:</strong> Author’s compilation based on official social economy and macroeconomic indicators.
</div>

<div class="btn-group">
<button class="dl-btn active" data-group="actors">Actors</button>
<button class="dl-btn" data-group="income">Income</button>
<button class="dl-btn" data-group="macro">Macro Context</button>
</div>

<div class="controls">
<label><strong>Start Year</strong><br><select id="startYear"></select></label>
<label><strong>End Year</strong><br><select id="endYear"></select></label>
</div>

<div class="kpi-grid">
<div class="kpi-card"><div class="kpi-label">Selected Indicator</div><div class="kpi-value" id="kpiIndicator">-</div></div>
<div class="kpi-card"><div class="kpi-label">Selected Year</div><div class="kpi-value" id="kpiYear">-</div></div>
<div class="kpi-card"><div class="kpi-label">Latest Value</div><div class="kpi-value" id="kpiLatest">-</div></div>
<div class="kpi-card"><div class="kpi-label">First Value</div><div class="kpi-value" id="kpiFirst">-</div></div>
<div class="kpi-card"><div class="kpi-label">Change</div><div class="kpi-value" id="kpiChange">-</div></div>
</div>

<div class="note-box">
<strong>Source-based note</strong>
<p id="autoNote">The selected indicator shows the trend over the chosen period.</p>
</div>

<div class="chart-box">
<canvas id="socialChart"></canvas>
</div>

<a class="download-btn" href="data/social_economy_data.csv" download>Download CSV</a>

</div>

<script>
let rawData = [];
let chart;
let currentGroup = "actors";

const groups = {
  actors: {
    title: "Social Economy Actors",
    datasets: [
      {key:"coop_count", label:"Cooperatives"},
      {key:"assoc_count", label:"Associations"},
      {key:"foundation_count", label:"Foundations"}
    ]
  },
  income: {
    title: "Real Income Indicators",
    datasets: [
      {key:"coop_turnover_real", label:"Cooperative turnover, real"},
      {key:"association_income_real", label:"Association income, real"},
      {key:"foundation_income_real", label:"Foundation income, real"},
      {key:"total_social_economy_income_real", label:"Total social economy income, real"}
    ]
  },
  macro: {
    title: "Macro Context and Cooperative Employment",
    datasets: [
      {key:"emp_rate", label:"Employment rate"},
      {key:"unempl_rate", label:"Unemployment rate"},
      {key:"gdp_growth", label:"GDP growth"},
      {key:"coop_emp_rate", label:"Cooperative employment rate"}
    ]
  }
};

function toNumber(v){
  return Number(String(v).replace(",", "."));
}

function formatNumber(v){
  if (Math.abs(v) >= 1000000000) return (v/1000000000).toFixed(1) + " bn";
  if (Math.abs(v) >= 1000000) return (v/1000000).toFixed(1) + " m";
  return v.toLocaleString("en-US", {maximumFractionDigits:1});
}

function populateYears(){
  const years = rawData.map(d => d.year);
  const start = document.getElementById("startYear");
  const end = document.getElementById("endYear");

  years.forEach(y => {
    start.innerHTML += `<option value="${y}">${y}</option>`;
    end.innerHTML += `<option value="${y}">${y}</option>`;
  });

  start.value = years[0];
  end.value = years[years.length-1];

  start.addEventListener("change", drawChart);
  end.addEventListener("change", drawChart);
}

function filteredData(){
  const s = Number(document.getElementById("startYear").value);
  const e = Number(document.getElementById("endYear").value);
  return rawData.filter(d => d.year >= s && d.year <= e);
}

function drawChart(){
  const data = filteredData();
  const config = groups[currentGroup];
  const labels = data.map(d => d.year);

  const datasets = config.datasets.map(ds => ({
    label: ds.label,
    data: data.map(d => toNumber(d[ds.key])),
    tension: .25,
    borderWidth: 2,
    pointRadius: 3
  }));

  if(chart) chart.destroy();

  chart = new Chart(document.getElementById("socialChart"), {
    type: "line",
    data: {labels, datasets},
    options: {
      responsive: true,
      plugins: {
        title: {display: true, text: config.title, font: {size: 18}},
        legend: {position: "right"}
      },
      scales: {
        x: {title: {display: true, text: "Year"}},
        y: {title: {display: true, text: "Value"}}
      }
    }
  });

  updateKpis(data, config);
}

function updateKpis(data, config){
  const main = config.datasets[0];
  const first = toNumber(data[0][main.key]);
  const latest = toNumber(data[data.length-1][main.key]);
  const change = ((latest-first)/first*100);

  document.getElementById("kpiIndicator").textContent = main.label;
  document.getElementById("kpiYear").textContent = data[data.length-1].year;
  document.getElementById("kpiLatest").textContent = formatNumber(latest);
  document.getElementById("kpiFirst").textContent = formatNumber(first);
  document.getElementById("kpiChange").textContent = change.toFixed(1) + "%";

  const direction = change >= 0 ? "an upward" : "a downward";
  document.getElementById("autoNote").textContent =
    `The selected indicator shows ${direction} pattern compared with the beginning of the selected period.`;
}

document.querySelectorAll(".dl-btn").forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener("click", function(){
    document.querySelectorAll(".dl-btn").forEach(b => b.classList.remove("active"));
    this.classList.add("active");
    currentGroup = this.dataset.group;
    drawChart();
  });
});

d3.text("data/social_economy_data.csv").then(function(text) {
  // Remove possible BOM and split rows
  let rows = text.replace(/^\uFEFF/, "").trim().split(/\r?\n/);
  // If the first row is only a file/table title, remove it
  if (rows[0].startsWith("social_economy_data")) {
    rows = rows.slice(1);
  }
  const cleanedText = rows.join("\n");
  rawData = d3.dsvFormat(";").parse(cleanedText).map(d => ({
    ...d,
    year: Number(d.year)
  }));
  populateYears();
  drawChart();
});
</script>
